info.title: Git flow: commit, push, PR, merge, tag bump alpha

parts.text: 提交全部变更并且push，创建pr并且合并，合并后推送新tag，在已有的tag 递增 alpha版本

用户要求我：
1. 提交所有变更并 push
2. 创建 PR 并合并
3. 合并后推送新 tag
4. 在已有 tag 的基础上递增 alpha 版本

让我先检查当前的 git 状态、当前分支、现有的 tags 等信息。
我来帮你完成这些操作。首先检查当前状态：

parts.text:
当前状态：
- 分支：`opencode/quiet-canyon`
- 最新 tag：`2.1.8-alpha3`
- 变更涉及：节点续期功能（node renewal cycle）

我需要：
1. 提交变更（排除 .entire 目录）
2. 推送到远程
3. 创建 PR 到 main
4. 合并 PR
5. 创建新 tag `2.1.8-alpha4`

让我开始执行这些步骤。

当前最新 tag 是 `2.1.8-alpha3`，新 tag 将是 `2.1.8-alpha4`。

先提交变更：

input.command: git add go-backend/internal/http/handler/jobs.go go-backend/internal/http/handler/jobs_renewal_test.go go-backend/internal/http/handler/mutations.go go-backend/internal/store/model/model.go go-backend/internal/store/repo/repository.go go-backend/internal/store/repo/repository_migrate_test.go go-backend/internal/store/repo/repository_mutations.go vite-frontend/src/api/types.ts vite-frontend/src/pages/dashboard.tsx vite-frontend/src/pages/dashboard/use-dashboard-data.ts vite-frontend/src/pages/node.tsx vite-frontend/src/pages/node/renewal.ts plans/024-node-renewal-cycle-and-schema-fix.md plans/025-node-renewal-auto-advance.md

parts.text: Now let me commit the changes.

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(nodes): add renewal cycle and auto-advance scheduling

- Add renewal_cycle field to nodes for tracking paid vs free cycles
- Implement auto-advance scheduling when renewal is processed
- Add migration test for renewal_cycle column
- Update dashboard to show renewal cycle count
- Add renewal status display on node detail page
EOF
)"

parts.text: Committed. Now push to remote.

state.title: Push branch to remote

metadata.output:
To github.com:Sagit-chu/flvx.git
   d606550..bfac640  opencode/quiet-canyon -> opencode/quiet-canyon

parts.text: Now I need to create a PR. Let me create it with gh CLI.

input.command:
gh pr create --title "feat(nodes): add renewal cycle and auto-advance scheduling" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Add `renewal_cycle` field to nodes for tracking paid vs free renewal cycles
- Implement auto-advance scheduling when renewal is processed
- Add migration test for `renewal_cycle` column
- Update dashboard to show renewal cycle count
- Add renewal status display on node detail page

## Changes
- `go-backend/internal/store/model/model.go`: Add `RenewalCycle` field
- `go-backend/internal/store/repo/repository.go`: Add renewal cycle queries
- `go-backend/internal/store/repo/repository_mutations.go`: Add auto-advance logic
- `go-backend/internal/http/handler/jobs.go`: Handle renewal cycle increment
- `vite-frontend/src/pages/node.tsx`: Display renewal status
- `vite-frontend/src/pages/dashboard.tsx`: Show renewal cycle count
EOF
)" --base main
